framework.reasoning: DNABERT-2 ships an official HuggingFace model (zhihanzhou/DNABERT-2-117M) with a proper model_type + bundled BPE tokenizer and ALiBi/GEGLU custom code (trust_remote_code). Unlike HyenaDNA, AutoModel loads it cleanly, so the faithful reproduction path is to fine-tune the released weights. GUE datasets are on HF hub. CUDA optional for Colab. YAML config keeps per-task settings simple.

module_hierarchy.description: Loads official DNABERT-2 backbone via AutoModel + adds a classification head for GUE tasks.

public_methods.name: from_pretrained
public_methods.signature: from_pretrained(cls, model_name: str, num_classes: int, pool: str, device: str) -> 'DNABERT2Classifier'

public_methods.name: forward
public_methods.signature: forward(self, input_ids: torch.Tensor, attention_mask: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor

module_hierarchy.description: Thin wrapper over the official DNABERT-2 BPE tokenizer (AutoTokenizer).

public_methods.name: encode_batch
public_methods.signature: encode_batch(self, seqs: List[str], max_len: int) -> Dict[str, torch.Tensor]

module_hierarchy.description: Configurable GUE loader for all 28 GUE datasets across 7 tasks (Table 12). Reads local CSVs or downloads via HF datasets.
Fine-tuning loop implementing Appendix A.3 recipe (AdamW lr 3e-5, warmup 50, wd 0.01, validate + keep best-by-val-loss).
MCC and F1 per GUE Table 12 (MCC for most tasks, F1 for Covid).
YAML loader + seed utility (python/numpy/torch) + GUE task registry (metric + num_classes per task).

tensor_flows.name: GUE classification forward
steps: BPE-tokenize raw DNA -> input_ids [B, L], attention_mask [B, L]

runtime.reason: required by DNABERT-2 remote modeling code
download GUE datasets from HF hub

entrypoints.purpose: Fine-tune DNABERT-2 on a GUE task
Evaluate a checkpoint on a GUE test split
Download GUE benchmark datasets via API

cli_args.help: specific GUE task; omit for all

risk_assessment.description: DNABERT-2 remote code pins a specific transformers/triton behavior; Flash-Attn path may fall back to eager on CPU.
risk_assessment.mitigation: trust_remote_code=True; model runs in eager attention on CPU/T4 automatically.
Not needed — dims come from the loaded pretrained config, not hardcoded.

risk_assessment.description: GUE dataset access/format varies; some tasks are large.
risk_assessment.mitigation: download.py pulls the GUE HF dataset; loader handles CSV; default to small promoter task for Colab.

risk_assessment.description: Pooling strategy for classification not specified in paper (conf 0.75).
risk_assessment.mitigation: Config-selectable mean/cls pooling; default mean with # ASSUMED comment.
